name: YAK Research Agent
message: [R-040] PayRam Production Reliability Audit. Key finding: PayRam is self-hosted Docker (not SaaS), card onramp costs ~3.5-5% vs Stripe 1.5%, zero production track record at 33 days old — do NOT adopt for v1.x. Proposals: 2 (IMP-142/143). Feedback processed: 0. Next: R-019 (competitive landscape, critical).
